What We Offer

Our Services

Professional, eco-friendly cleaning carried out by our trusted team.

✦

General Clean

Great for homes that are regularly maintained. Recommended for weekly or fortnightly upkeep.

  • Bedrooms
  • Bathrooms
  • Kitchen
  • Living / Dining
  • Vacuuming
  • Mopping
  • Dusting
  • Tidying
$160
★ RECOMMENDED
✦

Deep Clean

Recommended if your home has not been professionally cleaned in over 30 days, or for first-time visits.

Includes everything in General Clean, PLUS…

  • Skirting Boards
  • Dust Cornices
  • Window Frames & Ledges
  • Remove Cobwebs
  • Doors & Frames
$230

All prices include GST  ·  No lock-in contracts

Get a Quote

Fill out our quick form and receive a tailored quote within 2 hours.

Enjoy & Relax

Good to Know

Common Questions

100%Satisfaction Guarantee
How long does a cleaning service take?
A General Clean typically takes 2–4 hours, while a Deep Clean may take 4–8 hours depending on the size of your property.
Do I need to be home during the clean?
No — many clients provide access while they’re at work or out. All our cleaners are trusted and police-checked for your peace of mind.
Do you bring your own cleaning supplies?
Yes. Our team arrives fully equipped with professional tools and eco-friendly, non-toxic products to ensure the best results while keeping your home safe.
What if I’m not satisfied with the clean?
Contact us within 24 hours and we will return to re-clean the area at no extra cost. Your satisfaction is our priority.
